## How tested

Run the verify commands locally and confirm they are green:

```bash
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run test
npm run build
```

Also note any manual testing (e.g. dashboard behavior, MCP tools, macOS app).

## Checklist

- [ ] lint+typecheck+test+build green
- [ ] Changes are written in English (code, comments, docs)
- [ ] Diff is surgical - no unrelated reformatting
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] UI_VERSION bumped in the nav rail (UI changes only)
